---
title: "2d: Metadata Enrichment Report"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the metadata enrichment step, which joins MLST (Multi-Locus Sequence Typing) results into the mash-filtered genome metadata.

## Enriched Metadata Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("../temp/2d_enriched_metadata.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
print(f"Total genomes: {df.shape[0]}")
print(f"Total columns: {df.shape[1]}")
print(f"MLST matched: {df['mlst'].notna().sum()} / {df.shape[0]}")
print(f"Unique STs: {df['mlst'].nunique()}")
```

## MLST Sequence Type Distribution

```{python}
mlst_counts = df["mlst"].value_counts().head(20)
print(mlst_counts.to_markdown())
```
